meta.title: Affordable Housing Analysis Tool Watch
meta.refresh_cadence: Quarterly review, or sooner when major LIHTC, HUD income-limit, QCT/DDA, FMR, or underwriting-tool releases are announced.
meta.methodology: Curated watchlist of external affordable-housing analysis tools relevant to COHO workflows. Entries are descriptive evaluations, not endorsements. Source URLs are official vendor or agency pages; unavailable values should remain null plus VERIFY until directly confirmed.

entries.title: Novogradac Rent & Income Limit Calculator
entries.capability_summary: Calculates affordable-housing income and rent limits used in LIHTC underwriting and compliance workflows.
entries.relevance_to_coho: Benchmark peer for Deal Calculator rent-limit UX, AMI-band handling, and county/state selection patterns.
entries.source_note: Official Novogradac product page; verified in browser, not bot-fetchable due to Cloudflare challenge.

entries.title: Novogradac Qualified Census Tract Estimator
entries.capability_summary: Screens address or geography context for Qualified Census Tract and Difficult Development Area relevance.
entries.relevance_to_coho: Benchmark peer for COHO Opportunity Finder and PMA QCT/DDA disclosure patterns.
entries.source_note: Official Novogradac product page; verified in browser, not bot-fetchable due to Cloudflare challenge.

entries.title: HUD USER QCT/DDA data and locator resources
entries.tool_name: Qualified Census Tracts and Difficult Development Areas
entries.capability_summary: Publishes HUD-designated Qualified Census Tracts and Difficult Development Areas for LIHTC basis-boost screening.
entries.relevance_to_coho: Primary-source reference for COHO QCT/DDA overlays, Opportunity Finder basis-boost flags, and HNA map methodology.
entries.source_note: Official HUD USER dataset page; bot probe returned AWS WAF challenge but the endpoint is an official HUD USER source.

entries.title: HUD USER Fair Market Rents data and query resources
entries.capability_summary: Publishes HUD Fair Market Rent datasets and documentation used for affordability and rent-reasonableness context.
entries.relevance_to_coho: Primary-source peer for FMR comparisons, rent context checks, and Deal Calculator guardrails.
entries.source_note: Official HUD USER dataset page; bot probe returned AWS WAF challenge but the endpoint is an official HUD USER source.

entries.title: HUD USER Income Limits data and query resources
entries.capability_summary: Publishes HUD income-limit datasets and documentation for area median income and program-eligibility calculations.
entries.relevance_to_coho: Primary-source peer for COHO AMI-band logic, HNA household tiering, and Deal Calculator rent/income limit workflows.
entries.source_note: Official HUD USER dataset page; bot probe returned AWS WAF challenge but the endpoint is an official HUD USER source.
